scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields, protocol options, and examples correctly. Minor discrepancy: uses 'otel' instead of 'opentelemetry' for the type value, and doesn't include the syslog SD-ID detail, but otherwise matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The type value 'otel' may be incorrect — gold standard specifies 'opentelemetry'. Also mentions service exclusion with '-' prefix which isn't in the gold standard (may be valid but unverified). The charm context paragraph references 'loki-push-api' relation and specific charm names not in gold standard.
